name: Cursor
summary: IDE (VS Code fork) with integrated AI assistance, agent mode, and codebase-aware context for software development.
strengths: Tight editor integration for refactor-and-apply workflows
Strong codebase indexing and multi-file edits in many stacks
Active iteration on agent UX for developers
weaknesses: Product and model availability evolve quickly—verify current limits and policies
Heavy reliance on cloud features may not fit air-gapped or strict compliance environments without extra setup
best_for: Day-to-day coding with AI-assisted edits across a repo
Iterating on features with conversational context tied to files
avoid_for: Environments where third-party IDE sync or AI features are disallowed without review
notes: Capability set depends on plan and product version; treat as a snapshot for orientation.
